title: Lesson: Jogando no Big Blind Pre-Flop
plan: Read the PDF source material for BB preflop ranges and strategy
Add BB defense hand tier constants (call ranges and 3-bet ranges per opener position) to lesson_classifier.py
Add _get_bb_defense_tier() helper method to map opener positions to tiers
Replace the stub _eval_bb_preflop() method with full evaluation logic
Add unit tests for BB preflop evaluation (tier assignment, correct calls, 3-bets, folds, marginal hands, edge cases)
Update prd.json status and tracking files
